positive: A seamless, symmetrical mandala-inspired pattern featuring stylized celestial elements, including crescent moons, constellations, and blooming bioluminescent flora, interwoven with sacred geometry patterns. The composition must have clean, bold silhouettes and strong contrast. Style is Neo-Art Deco meets Mystical Botanical Engraving. Use a limited, earthy color palette of deep navy, terracotta orange, cream, and muted gold accents. Highly detailed line work, suitable for full apparel print, centralized composition, elegant, mystic, high contrast, perfect for screen printing.
